message:
test(fcp-conformance): expand FCPS durability boundary tests with recovery artifact bundle and fix signed frame mutation assertion

Adds a comprehensive repair/recovery artifact bundle integration test
that exercises the full repair lifecycle in an FCPS durability context:

- build_recovery_artifact_bundle() sets up a 3-object zone with a pinned
  root, a leased payload with 2/3 source symbols (under-replicated),
  and an expired-lease object.
- Captures before/after repair snapshots (zone lifecycle, repair
  evaluation, repair plan) and runs GC to evict the expired object.
- Produces a deterministic JSON evidence bundle.

Test repair_recovery_artifact_bundle_is_deterministic_and_serializable:
- Verifies bundle determinism (two calls produce identical JSON).
- Asserts before-repair: 3 objects, 0 reconstructable, queue depth 1,
  queue action "queue", reason PolicySloDeficit, plan has repair action.
- Asserts after-repair: 1 reconstructable, queue depth 0, queue action
  "remove", reason Healthy, empty plan.
- Asserts GC: 1 expired lease evicted with LeaseExpired reason.
- Verifies JSON serialization roundtrip.

fcp-protocol/fcps.rs: Fix signed frame mutation test — mutating
symbol_count changes encoded frame bytes, so verification fails with
signature mismatch rather than CryptoError::SerializationError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
